# The Aqumen Cloud: An Overview
Apr 25, 2025 
  * [](https://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=https://quantumcircuits.com/aqumen-cloud-overview/)
  * [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https://quantumcircuits.com/aqumen-cloud-overview/&title=The%20Aqumen%20Cloud:%20An%20Overview)
  * [](https://twitter.com/share?url=https://quantumcircuits.com/aqumen-cloud-overview/)


We review in this video the basics of our full-stack approach to quantum computing. From the ground up, we are a Quantum-as-a-Service provider. Access to the dual-rail qubit-based Aqumen Seeker system and AquSim (simulator) is provided via a cloud interface. With simple login credentials and an SDK, you’re off and running with the most advanced and scalable dual-rail quantum systems.
Aqumen Cloud provides a direct entry point for users into all things Quantum Circuits. There’s no third party mediating access. Account management, job status, and queue visibility are all provided by Quantum Circuits tooling through an all-encompassing, intuitive Web app. The goal of Aqumen Cloud is to be invisible, fast, and provide tools users need to execute quantum jobs on Seeker and AquSim without extra overhead.

<p class="has-dropcap">We review in this video the basics of our full-stack approach to quantum computing. From the ground up, we are a Quantum-as-a-Service provider. Access to the dual-rail qubit-based Aqumen Seeker system and AquSim (simulator) is provided via a cloud interface. With simple login credentials and an SDK, you’re off and running with the most advanced and scalable dual-rail quantum systems.</p>



<p>Aqumen Cloud provides a direct entry point for users into all things Quantum Circuits. There’s no third party mediating access. Account management, job status, and queue visibility are all provided by Quantum Circuits tooling through an all-encompassing, intuitive Web app. The goal of Aqumen Cloud is to be invisible, fast, and provide tools users need to execute quantum jobs on Seeker and AquSim without extra overhead.</p>
